# Amazon Bedrock User Guide - Document History (Complete Changelog)

## Latest Update
**February 27, 2026**

---

## All Documented Changes (Most Recent First)

### February 2026
- **Converse API support for batch inference** (Feb 27, 2026): Use Converse API format for batch inference input data with consistent request format across models
- **Fine-tuning open-weight models with OpenAI APIs** (Feb 17, 2026): Create, monitor, and manage reinforcement fine-tuning jobs through OpenAI SDK endpoints (Files API, fine-tuning jobs APIs, inference APIs)

### December 2025 - January 2026
- **Service tier model support updates** (Dec 31, 2025): Updated list of models for priority and flex service tiers
- **Blueprint instruction optimization** (Dec 18, 2025): Amazon Bedrock Data Automation supports document blueprint instruction optimization with ground truth labels
- **New managed IAM policies** (Dec 3, 2025):
  - AmazonBedrockMantleFullAccess
  - AmazonBedrockMantleReadOnly
  - AmazonBedrockMantleInferenceAccess
- **OpenAI compatible API endpoints** (Dec 3, 2025): Amazon Bedrock Mantle provides OpenAI-compatible endpoints including Responses API and Chat Completions API for asynchronous inference
- **Reinforcement fine-tuning** (Dec 3, 2025): New reinforcement fine-tuning feature to improve foundation model performance
- **Reserved service tier** (Nov 26, 2025): New "Reserved" service tier for Bedrock inference
- **Claude Opus 4.5 support** (Nov 24, 2025): New Anthropic Claude Opus 4.5 model available
- **Cross-account guardrails sharing** (Nov 21, 2025): Share guardrails across AWS organization accounts
- **Synchronous invocation for Data Automation** (Nov 20, 2025): Amazon Bedrock Data Automation now supports synchronous invocation
- **Custom model import - OpenAI GPT-OSS** (Nov 19, 2025): Custom model import supports OpenAI GPT-OSS models
- **Enhanced coding support for Guardrails** (Nov 19, 2025): Standard tier provides enhanced support for coding use cases with upgraded content filters
- **Priority and flex service tiers** (Nov 18, 2025): New on-demand inference service tiers
- **Region expansion** (Nov 18, 2025): Available in Africa (Cape Town), Asia Pacific (New Zealand), Canada West (Calgary), Mexico (Central), Middle East (Bahrain)
- **PostgreSQL text search update** (Oct 31, 2025): Use 'english' dictionary instead of 'simple' for Aurora Knowledge Base integration

### October 2025
- **Claude 3.7 Sonnet legacy status** (Oct 30, 2025): Migrate to Claude Sonnet 4.5 before April 28, 2026
- **Stability AI Image Services** (Oct 28, 2025): Four new services available (outpaint and upscale)
- **Model customization chaining** (Oct 16, 2025): Use previously customized models as base for further customization
- **Claude Haiku 4.5** (Oct 15, 2025): New model available
- **Default model access** (Oct 15, 2025): All foundation models enabled by default with correct IAM permissions
- **Guardrails cross-region expansion** (Oct 9, 2025): Generally available in 5 additional regions (Asia Pacific Bangkok/Kuala Lumpur/Taipei, Israel Tel Aviv, Middle East Dubai)
- **Updated AmazonBedrockFullAccess policy** (Oct 7, 2025): Enables access to serverless foundation models by default
- **Batch inference model support** (Oct 3, 2025): DeepSeek V3.1, Qwen3 models (32B, 235B, 480B variants)
- **Cohere Embed v4** (Oct 2, 2025): New embedding model available
- **Qwen3 model import** (Sep 30, 2025): Custom model import now supports Qwen3
- **Cohere Rerank 3.5 expansion** (Sep 30, 2025): Available in US East (N. Virginia)
- **Guardrails Australia expansion** (Sep 29, 2025): Generally available in Asia Pacific (Melbourne) with cross-region inference

### September 2025
- **Claude Sonnet 4.5** (Sep 29, 2025): New model available (Sep 25 also listed)
- **Stability AI Image Services** (Sep 18, 2025): New image generation models available
- **Meta Llama 3.3 70B** (Sep 15, 2025): Available for fine-tuning and continued pretraining
- **Guardrails region expansion** (Sep 11, 2025): Supported in Asia Pacific (Jakarta)
- **TwelveLabs Marengo Embed 2.7** (Sep 9, 2025): Supports InvokeModel API
- **Bearer token condition key** (Sep 4, 2025): Use bedrock:bearerTokenType with bedrock:CallWithBearerToken action
- **Mortgage flow tutorial** (Sep 2, 2025): New tutorial with CloudFormation templates
- **OpenAI batch API support** (Aug 27, 2025): New batch API support
- **Data Automation region expansion** (Aug 25, 2025): Available in AWS GovCloud (US-West)
- **Multi-language data extraction** (Aug 25, 2025): Portuguese, French, Italian, Spanish, German support
- **Token count estimation** (Aug 21, 2025): Estimate token counts for some models
- **TwelveLabs Pegasus 1.2 expansion** (Aug 14, 2025): US East (N. Virginia) and Asia Pacific (Seoul)
- **Guardrails region expansion** (Aug 11, 2025): US West (N. California)
- **OpenAI gpt-oss models** (Aug 5, 2025): gpt-oss-20b and gpt-oss-120b support
- **Automated Reasoning checks** (Aug 5, 2025): Guardrails validates accuracy of model responses
- **Region expansion** (Jul 31, 2025): Asia Pacific (Melbourne)
- **Claude Opus 4.1** (Jul 31, 2025): New model available
- **Amazon Nova Premier batch inference** (Jul 29, 2025): Inference profile support
- **Region expansion** (Jul 28, 2025): US West (N. California)
- **Data Automation file types** (Jul 28, 2025): DOC/DOCX and H.265 support
- **Data Automation region expansion** (Jul 16, 2025): Europe (Frankfurt, London, Ireland), Asia Pacific (Mumbai, Sydney)
- **SageMaker AI Amazon Nova import** (Jul 16, 2025): Import SageMaker-trained Nova models
- **Custom model on-demand deployment** (Jul 16, 2025): Deploy custom models for pay-per-token inference
- **TwelveLabs models** (Jul 15, 2025): Pegasus 1.2 and Marengo Embed 2.7
- **Claude 3.7 Sonnet in GovCloud** (Jul 7, 2025): AWS GovCloud (US-West) support
- **New managed policies** (Jul 7, 2025):
  - AmazonBedrockLimitedAccess
  - AmazonBedrockMarketplaceAccess
- **API keys support** (Jul 7, 2025): Create API keys for easy authentication
- **Intelligent prompt routing region expansion** (Jul 3, 2025): AWS GovCloud (US-West and US-East)
- **Batch inference model support** (Jul 3, 2025): Meta Llama 4 Scout 17B and Llama 4 Maverick 17B
- **Prompt management region expansion** (Jul 1, 2025): Europe (Milan, Spain), Asia Pacific (Hyderabad, Osaka)
- **Flows region expansion** (Jul 1, 2025): Europe (Milan, Spain), Asia Pacific (Hyderabad, Osaka)
- **Knowledge Base region expansion** (Jun 26, 2025): Asia Pacific (Hyderabad, Osaka), Europe (Milan, Spain)

### June 2025
- **Guardrails safeguard tiers** (Jun 23, 2025): Performance and language options for content filters
- **Inline code nodes** (Jun 19, 2025): Run code directly in flows (Preview)
- **Flow executions** (Jun 19, 2025): Run flows for longer durations (Preview)
- **Agent creation tutorial** (May 28, 2025): New simple agent tutorial

### May 2025
- **Claude Sonnet 4 and Opus 4** (May 22, 2025): New models available
- **Data Automation custom output for videos** (May 19, 2025): Video custom output support
- **Blueprint support for videos** (May 16, 2025): BDA blueprints for videos
- **Guardrails cross-region inference** (May 13, 2025): Cross-region support
- **Custom model import expansion** (May 12, 2025): Qwen2, Qwen2.5, Qwen2-VL, Qwen2.5-VL support
- **Data Automation custom blueprints for audio** (May 5, 2025): Audio file support
- **Meta Llama 4 models** (Apr 28, 2025): Scout 17B and Maverick 17B Instruct
- **Writer Palmyra models** (Apr 28, 2025): X4 and X5 models
- **S3 reference for images/documents** (Apr 25, 2025): Reference S3-stored content in InvokeModel and Converse APIs
- **Data Automation enhancements** (Apr 25, 2025): Modality routing and hyperlink support
- **Intelligent prompt routing GA** (Apr 22, 2025): General availability
- **Knowledge Base metadata support** (Apr 10, 2025): User-provided metadata fields and hybrid search
- **Custom model import region expansion** (Apr 9, 2025): Europe (Frankfurt)
- **Pixtral Large model** (Apr 8, 2025): Version 25.02 available
- **Harmful content handling options** (Apr 7, 2025): New handling options in Guardrails
- **Batch inference region expansion** (Apr 4, 2025): AWS GovCloud (US-West) for Nova models
- **Batch inference regional support** (Apr 2, 2025): Multiple Asia Pacific and European regions

### March 2025
- **Provisioned Throughput expansion** (Apr 2, 2025): Amazon Nova Canvas and extended context windows
- **OpenSearch Managed Clusters** (Mar 27, 2025): Vector store option for Knowledge Bases
- **Flow templates** (Mar 27, 2025): Get started with pre-built templates
- **Amazon Bedrock Studio migration** (Mar 25, 2025): Moved to SageMaker Unified Studio
- **Guardrails IAM enforcement** (Mar 18, 2025): Enforce specific guardrails via IAM condition key
- **Region expansion** (Mar 14, 2025): Europe (Milan, Spain)
- **Cross-region structured data retrieval** (Mar 13, 2025): Knowledge Bases enhancement
- **Intelligent prompt routing preview** (Mar 13, 2025): Configured prompt routers
- **Provisioned Throughput Llama 3.2 support** (Mar 13, 2025): US West (Oregon)
- **Knowledge Base reasoning models** (Mar 12, 2025): Deepseek-R1 and Claude 3.7 Sonnet support
- **DeepSeek-R1 model** (Mar 10, 2025): New reasoning model available
- **Agent computer use** (Mar 10, 2025): Configure agents for computer use tasks
- **GraphRAG GA** (Mar 7, 2025): General availability with additional capabilities
- **Data Automation GA** (Mar 3, 2025): General availability with increased accuracy
- **Region expansion** (Feb 27, 2025): Europe (Stockholm)
- **Session management APIs** (Feb 27, 2025): Manage state for open-source framework applications
- **Claude 3.7 Sonnet** (Feb 24, 2025): New model available
- **Region expansion** (Feb 21, 2025): Asia Pacific (Hyderabad, Osaka)
- **Cohere Embed models** (Jan 24, 2025): English and Multilingual versions

### January 2025
- **Luma Ray v2** (Jan 23, 2025): New video generation model
- **Multi-turn agent conversations** (Jan 22, 2025): Converse with agent nodes in flows
- **Llama 3.3 70B batch inference** (Dec 23, 2024): Regional support

### December 2024
- **Llama 3.3 70B Instruct** (Dec 19, 2024): New model available
- **Stable Diffusion 3.5** (Dec 19, 2024): New image model
- **Guardrails French/Spanish** (Dec 9, 2024): Language support expansion
- **Batch inference with inference profiles** (Dec 6, 2024): Profile support
- **Updated managed policies** (Dec 4, 2024): Marketplace permissions added
- **Amazon Bedrock Marketplace** (Dec 4, 2024): Deploy and run marketplace models
- **Knowledge Base structured data** (Dec 4, 2024): Connect to structured stores, generate SQL
- **Multimodal data parsing** (Dec 4, 2024): Parse images in knowledge bases
- **Image content filters** (Dec 4, 2024): Guardrails filter harmful images
- **Multi-agent collaboration** (Dec 3, 2024): Agents collaborate on complex tasks
- **Model distillation** (Dec 3, 2024): Transfer knowledge from teacher to student models
- **Latency optimized models** (Dec 2, 2024): Meta and Anthropic models
- **Guardrails in KB retrieval** (Dec 1, 2024): Apply guardrails to retrieval results
- **RetrieveAndGenerateStream API** (Dec 1, 2024): Streaming version available
- **Retrieval filtering** (Dec 1, 2024): Filter based on user queries and metadata
- **Reranker support** (Dec 1, 2024): Rerank document relevance
- **Direct document ingestion** (Dec 1, 2024): Ingest document changes in one step
- **Custom data source connectors** (Dec 1, 2024): Connect to custom data sources
- **Region expansion** (Nov 22, 2024): Multiple regions for Agents, Knowledge Bases, Flows
- **Flows GA** (Nov 22, 2024): General availability
- **Binary embeddings** (Nov 21, 2024): Knowledge base support
- **Prompt optimization** (Nov 20, 2024): Optimize prompts in Prompt management
- **Region expansion** (Nov 11, 2024): AWS GovCloud (US-East), Europe (Zurich)
- **Knowledge Bases in US East (Ohio)** (Nov 8, 2024): Regional support
- **Flow trace viewing** (Nov 7, 2024): Track node inputs/outputs
- **Guardrails in flows** (Nov 7, 2024): Knowledge base/prompt node guardrails
- **Prompt management GA** (Nov 7, 2024): General availability
- **Inference profile region expansion** (Nov 6, 2024): Asia Pacific regions
- **Cross-region inference profiles** (Nov 6, 2024): Anthropic and Meta models
- **Claude 3.5 Haiku** (Nov 4, 2024): New model available
- **Application inference profiles** (Nov 1, 2024): Create custom profiles for cost/metrics tracking
- **Model-specific parameters in prompts** (Oct 31, 2024): Include inference parameters
- **Claude 3.5 Sonnet v2** (Oct 22, 2024): New version with computer use tools
- **Read-only policy updates** (Oct 21, 2024): Custom Model Import permissions
- **Playground merger** (Oct 21, 2024): Text and chat merged into Chat/text playground
- **Batch inference region expansion** (Oct 7, 2024): Asia Pacific (Seoul)
- **Region expansion** (Oct 1, 2024): US East (Ohio), Asia Pacific (Seoul)
- **Claude Opus 4 legacy** (Oct 1, 2024): Migrate to Claude Opus 4.1 before May 31, 2026
- **Meta Llama 3.2** (Sep 25, 2024): 1B, 3B, 11B, 90B Instruct models
- **Binary embeddings Titan Text V2** (Sep 25, 2024): Embedding support
- **Guardrails CloudWatch monitoring** (Sep 24, 2024): Monitor with CloudWatch Metrics
- **Inference profile evaluation** (Sep 24, 2024): Model evaluation support
- **AI21 Jamba 1.5** (Sep 23, 2024): Large and Mini models
- **Inference profiles in Prompt management/Flows** (Sep 23, 2024): Profile integration
- **Provisioned Throughput Claude 3.5 Sonnet** (Sep 23, 2024): US West (Oregon)
- **EventBridge monitoring for batch jobs** (Sep 18, 2024): Status change monitoring
- **Cross-account batch inference** (Sep 16, 2024): Submit files from other accounts
- **VPC support for batch inference** (Sep 16, 2024): Network isolation
- **Inference profiles for KB generation** (Sep 11, 2024): Knowledge base integration
- **Content reorganization** (Sep 4, 2024): Updated topic titles and structure
- **Stability AI image models** (Sep 4, 2024): Ultra, Diffusion 3 Large, Core
- **Read-only policy updates** (Aug 27, 2024): Inference profile permissions
- **Cross-region inference** (Aug 27, 2024): Increase throughput with profiles
- **Agent user confirmation** (Aug 26, 2024): Request user confirmation before action
- **Read-only policy updates** (Aug 21, 2024): Batch inference and Guardrails permissions
- **Batch inference GA** (Aug 21, 2024): General availability
- **Amazon Titan Image Generator G1 V2** (Aug 6, 2024): New image generation model
- **Llama 3 in GovCloud** (Aug 1, 2024): AWS GovCloud (US-West) support
- **Custom model copy** (Aug 1, 2024): Copy custom models across regions
- **Custom model sharing** (Aug 1, 2024): Share models with other accounts
- **Mistral Large 2** (Jul 24, 2024): New model available
- **Meta Llama 3.1** (Jul 23, 2024): New model available
- **Prompt management and Flows in Studio** (Jul 22, 2024): Studio integration
- **Amazon Bedrock Flows GA** (Jul 10, 2024): General availability
- **Prompt management** (Jul 10, 2024): Create and save reusable prompts
- **Agent KB query configuration** (Jul 10, 2024): Modify at runtime
- **KB chunking and parsing** (Jul 10, 2024): Semantic, hierarchical, advanced parsing
- **Query decomposition** (Jul 10, 2024): Break down complex queries
- **Data source connectors** (Jul 10, 2024): Confluence, Salesforce, SharePoint, web URLs
- **Agent code interpretation** (Jul 10, 2024): Generate, run, troubleshoot code
- **Agent memory** (Jul 10, 2024): Retain conversational context
- **Independent Guardrails API** (Jul 10, 2024): Call guardrails separately
- **Contextual grounding checks** (Jul 10, 2024): Guardrails feature
- **Agent region expansion** (Jun 28, 2024): Canada, Europe (London), South America
- **AI21 Jamba-Instruct** (Jun 25, 2024): New model available
- **Guardrails region expansion** (Jun 21, 2024): Canada, Europe (London), South America
- **Documents in chat playground** (Jun 21, 2024): Document inclusion support
- **Claude 3.5 Sonnet** (Jun 20, 2024): New model available
- **Cohere Embed V3 types** (Jun 20, 2024): int8 and binary embedding support
- **Guardrails with Converse API** (Jun 18, 2024): API integration
- **Region expansion** (Jun 13, 2024): Canada, Europe, South America
- **Agent trace visibility** (Jun 13, 2024): Lambda handling information
- **Claude 3 Opus** (Jun 7, 2024): New model available
- **Converse API** (May 30, 2024): Conversational applications
- **Tool use** (May 30, 2024): Tools with Bedrock models
- **Amazon Titan Text Embeddings V2** (May 30, 2024): KB embedding support
- **Mistral Small** (May 24, 2024): New model available
- **Agent guardrails** (May 20, 2024): Guardrails with agents
- **KB inference parameters** (May 9, 2024): Modify at query time
- **Amazon Titan Text Premier** (May 7, 2024): New model available
- **Amazon Bedrock Studio preview** (May 7, 2024): Preview release
- **Agent alias provisioned throughput** (May 2, 2024): PT support
- **Region expansion** (May 1, 2024): Europe (Ireland), Asia Pacific (Mumbai)
- **MongoDB Atlas vector store** (May 1, 2024): KB support
- **Titan Text Embeddings V2** (Apr 30, 2024): New embedding model
- **Provisioned Throughput expansion** (Apr 30, 2024): AI21 Jurassic-2 Ultra
- **Cohere Command R/R+** (Apr 29, 2024): New models
- **Custom model import** (Apr 23, 2024): Import custom models
- **Agent return control** (Apr 23, 2024): Return elicited information in response
- **Agent action by parameters** (Apr 23, 2024): Define actions by required parameters
- **Chat with documents** (Apr 23, 2024): Document chat feature
- **Multiple data sources in KB** (Apr 23, 2024): Multiple source support
- **Amazon Bedrock Guardrails** (Apr 23, 2024): Safeguards for model inputs/outputs
- **Claude 3 Opus** (Apr 16, 2024): New model (updated Apr 23)
- **Region expansion** (Apr 9, 2024): Asia Pacific (Sydney)
- **CloudFormation support** (Apr 5, 2024): Agents and Knowledge Bases resources
- **Region expansion** (Apr 4, 2024): Europe (Paris)
- **Claude 3 Haiku KB support** (Apr 4, 2024): Knowledge base response generation
- **Mistral Large** (Apr 3, 2024): New model available
- **Provisioned Throughput commitment-free** (Mar 29, 2024): No commitment required
- **PT model expansion** (Mar 29, 2024): Claude 3 Sonnet/Haiku, Cohere Embed
- **OpenSearch Serverless VPC endpoints** (Mar 28, 2024): Network access policy support
- **KB document metadata** (Mar 27, 2024): Metadata support with filtering
- **KB prompt templates** (Mar 26, 2024): Customize query prompts
- **Claude 3 Sonnet KB support** (Mar 25, 2024): Knowledge base response generation
- **Agent latency optimization** (Mar 20, 2024): Single knowledge base optimization
- **Claude 3 Haiku** (Mar 13, 2024): New model available
- **Claude 3 Sonnet** (Mar 4, 2024): New model available
- **Mistral AI models** (Mar 1, 2024): Mistral models available
- **Knowledge Base search customization** (Feb 28, 2024): Search strategy for OpenSearch Serverless
- **Image watermark detection** (Feb 14, 2024): Titan Image Generator feature
- **AWS PrivateLink VPC endpoints** (Feb 9, 2024): Build-time service endpoints
- **IAM role flexibility** (Feb 9, 2024): Same role across knowledge bases
- **Stable Diffusion XL v0.8 legacy** (Feb 2, 2024): Migrate before Apr 30, 2024
- **Code examples chapter** (Jan 25, 2024): Comprehensive code examples
- **KB production vs non-production** (Jan 24, 2024): Account type selection for OpenSearch
- **Agent real-time traces** (Jan 18, 2024): Real-time trace viewing in console
- **Cohere Embed for KB** (Jan 17, 2024): English and Multilingual models
- **Claude 2.1 support** (Dec 27, 2023): Agents and Knowledge Bases
- **AWS GovCloud expansion** (Dec 21, 2023): US-West region
- **Amazon Aurora vector store** (Dec 21, 2023): KB support
- **New managed policies** (Dec 12, 2023):
  - AmazonBedrockFullAccess
  - AmazonBedrockReadOnly
- **Model evaluation** (Nov 29, 2023): Automatic metrics and human evaluation
- **Model lifecycle management** (Nov 29, 2023): Monitor and customize versions
- **Titan Image Generator G1 V1** (Nov 29, 2023): New image model
- **Titan Multimodal Embeddings G1** (Nov 29, 2023): New embedding model
- **Continued pre-training** (Nov 28, 2023): Domain knowledge training
- **Retrieve and RetrieveAndGenerate APIs** (Nov 28, 2023): KB querying
- **Agents GA** (Nov 28, 2023): General availability
- **Knowledge Bases GA** (Nov 28, 2023): General availability
- **Custom model support expansion** (Nov 28, 2023): Cohere and Meta customization
- **New model releases** (Nov 13, 2023): Meta and Cohere models
- **Documentation localization** (Oct 20, 2023): Japanese and German
- **Region expansion** (Oct 19, 2023): Europe (Frankfurt)
- **Region expansion** (Oct 3, 2023): Asia Pacific (Tokyo)
- **Gated general release** (Sep 28, 2023): Amazon Bedrock service launch

---

## Summary by Category

### Models Added
- Anthropic Claude family (3, 3.5, 3.7, Opus 4, 4.1, 4.5, Sonnet 4, 4.5, Haiku 4.5)
- Meta Llama 3, 3.1, 3.2, 3.3, 4 Scout, 4 Maverick
- Cohere Command R/R+, Embed models, Rerank 3.5
- Mistral (Small, Large, Large 2)
- AI21 Jamba, Jurassic-2
- Writer Palmyra X4/X5
- Stability AI (Diffusion 3, 3.5, Ultra, Core, Image Services)
- Amazon Titan (Text Premier, Image Generator, Embeddings)
- DeepSeek-R1, V3.1
- OpenAI gpt-oss-20b/120b
- Qwen2, Qwen2.5, Qwen3 variants
- TwelveLabs Pegasus, Marengo Embed
- Pixtral Large
- Luma Ray v2

### Features & Services
- Amazon Bedrock Agents
- Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases
- Amazon Bedrock Guardrails
- Amazon Bedrock Flows
- Prompt Management
- Batch Inference
- Cross-Region Inference Profiles
- Custom Model Import/Export
- Model Distillation
- Reinforcement Fine-tuning
- Model Evaluation
- Computer Use Tools
- Code Interpretation
- Session Management
- Data Automation (BDA)
- GraphRAG
- Multi-agent Collaboration
- Agent Memory
- Semantic Chunking
- Binary Embeddings
- API Keys

### Regions Expanded
- Africa (Cape Town)
- Americas: Canada Central, Canada West (Calgary), Mexico (Central), US East (Ohio), US West (N. California), US West (Oregon), AWS GovCloud (US-East, US-West), South America (Sao Paulo)
- Asia Pacific: Melbourne, New Zealand, Mumbai, Seoul, Singapore, Sydney, Tokyo, Bangkok, Hyderabad, Jakarta, Kuala Lumpur, Osaka, Taipei
- Europe: Frankfurt, Ireland, London, Milan, Paris, Stockholm, Spain, Zurich
- Middle East: Bahrain, Dubai, Tel Aviv (Israel)

### API Enhancements
- Converse API
- RetrieveAndGenerate/RetrieveAndGenerateStream
- Retrieve API
- OpenAI-compatible endpoints
- OpenAI batch API
- Bearer token support
- Session management APIs

---

This document represents the complete changelog from the Amazon Bedrock User Guide covering all major updates from the service launch (September 2023) through February 2026.
